title: Villa María, Córdoba — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Villa María, Córdoba: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Villa María is a city in Córdoba with a population of 98,000. Córdoba’s third city on the Ctalamochita River, with a growing industrial park and the Ansenuza National Park.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
